mapper.select:
SELECT a.id, a.appointment_no as appointmentNo, a.customer_id as customerId, c.name AS customerName, c.phone AS customerPhone, a.staff_id as staffId, s.name as staffName, a.appointment_time as appointmentTime, a.status, a.total_duration_minutes AS totalDurationMinutes, a.remark, a.update_time AS updateTime, a.create_time AS createTime FROM appointment a LEFT JOIN customer_profile c ON a.customer_id = c.id LEFT JOIN staff_member s ON a.staff_id = s.id
AND a.deleted = 0
AND c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dto.customerName}, '%')
AND s.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dto.staffName}, '%')
AND a.status = #{dto.status}
AND a.appointment_time BETWEEN #{dto.beginTime} AND #{dto.endTime}
AND ( a.staff_id = #{scopedStaffId} OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM appointment_item ai_scope WHERE ai_scope.appointment_id = a.id AND ai_scope.staff_id = #{scopedStaffId} ) )
ORDER BY a.appointment_time DESC, a.id DESC
